PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photorealistic amateur jewelry bench studio photograph of a MODERN sterling silver rosary necklace lying on a slightly cluttered grey workbench under mixed warm-and-cool lighting. The rosary has clean geometric oval links, small minimal smooth beads, and a flat minimalist modern crucifix — brushed/satin silver finish, not high-polish. Shot slightly tilted/crooked, mild yellow color cast from a desk lamp, real metal micro-scratches and fingerprints, faint dust, shallow but imperfect focus, candid documentary product-shot look, NOT a clean ecommerce render, NOT CGI-glossy. 4000x3000px.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Deliberately imperfect: crooked horizon (needs auto_straighten), warm color cast (needs color_temperature/auto_tone), real scratches/fingerprints and a messy bench background (needs subject isolation + clean sweep). This is the raw client capture, not a finished shot.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal phone photo of a carne asada lunch plate on a plain off-white restaurant plate against a moderately busy table background: grilled sliced steak, rice, refried beans, a folded warm tortilla, pico de gallo, lime. Clear subject/background separation so the dish can be cleanly masked. Warm natural daylight, real char marks, real steam, candid documentary realism, no CGI sheen.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Background should be a real cluttered table (other plates, condiments, blurred) so remove_background has a genuine non-trivial edge to cut — not a clean studio sweep.

defects.location: center steak, near the fold/curl visible in bottom-left and whole view
defects.description: One steak slice has an odd twisted curl that reads slightly ambiguous, but is plausible as a rolled edge of grilled skirt/flank — minor, not clearly a defect.

panel.summary: Convincing photoreal carne asada lunch plate with correct components, warm daylight, clean subject/background separation and no text — no genuine AI failures, only a slightly ambiguous steak curl worth a glance.

defects.location: right edge and lower edge of plate
defects.description: The plate/steak is cropped tight at the right and bottom edges, which slightly weakens usability for a clean full-dish cut-out.
No visible steam is present despite the stated requirement for real steam.

panel.summary: Solid photoreal lunch-plate asset with no obvious AI glitches, but the tight crop and missing steam keep it from being fully campaign-ready.
This is a clean, high-fidelity photograph that perfectly matches the brief with no detectable flaws.
Flawless execution; no AI artifacts or fidelity deviations detected.

Real condensation on the glass, real chip texture, documentary realism, no CGI.

defects.description: The rim of the speckled salsa bowl has a slightly irregular, wavy contour that dips oddly where it meets the lime — mild geometry softness typical of AI, but not obviously broken.
Blurred seated diners merge into soft indistinct forms with no clearly readable limbs; acceptable for intentional bokeh but the fusion is characteristic of generated crowds.

panel.summary: Clean, on-brief photoreal Mexican-restaurant table scene with convincing condensation, salt rim and chip texture; only trivial soft-geometry quirks in the salsa bowl rim and background crowd.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Flat 2D logo PNG on transparent background for a family-owned Mexican restaurant named 'El Vecino Cocina': bold hand-lettered wordmark with a small sombrero-and-chili-pepper emblem, warm terracotta-red and deep green palette, slightly hand-crafted neighborhood feel, crisp flat solid-color shapes (no gradients) suitable for vectorizing. Transparent background, high contrast.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Flat solid-color shapes with clean edges so image_vectorize produces a tidy SVG. Transparent PNG, modest resolution like a real client-supplied logo (e.g. 1200px wide), not a giant pristine vector export.

defects.description: 'EL VECINO COCINA' is spelled correctly and legible; only very minor edge softness on the letterforms, no garbling.

defects.location: letter edges throughout wordmark and sombrero/pepper emblem
defects.description: Slight soft/anti-aliased fuzzy edges rather than perfectly crisp flat vectors; acceptable for a client-supplied PNG but will produce slightly messy vectorization.

defects.location: red wordmark letters and sombrero emblem throughout
defects.description: Asset is specified as crisp flat solid-color shapes with no gradients, but the red and green fills show subtle tonal shading/soft modeled texture instead of clean flat vector-style color.

defects.location: outer edges of letters and emblem, especially around the sombrero and large wordmark
defects.description: Edges are slightly soft and uneven with faint gray edging/haloing, which will make vectorization less tidy than the stated clean flat-logo requirement.
Sombrero pieces feel visually fragmented and loosely aligned around the chili, reading more like separated cut shapes than a cohesive emblem.

panel.summary: Readable logo with correct name and palette, but it is too softly shaded and edge-haloed for the requested crisp flat vector-ready PNG.

defects.location: all edges of text and emblem
defects.description: All elements have soft, fuzzy, anti-aliased edges, directly contradicting the brief's requirement for 'crisp flat solid-color shapes' suitable for vectorizing. This will produce a poor-quality, lumpy vector trace.
The curves of the sombrero brim are slightly wobbly and not geometrically smooth, and the white gap separating the chili from the hat is inconsistent in width.

panel.summary: The logo concept is fine, but the soft, blurry edges make it technically unusable for vectorization and professional use.

defects.location: top-center emblem, between sombrero brim and chili pepper
defects.description: unintended white gap creating impossible geometry; breaks solid-color requirement and introduces off-palette color not in brand specification

panel.summary: Critical object integrity failure from unintended white gap breaks brand palette and vectorization readiness.

results.requirement:
TASK: Take the client's supplied composited Continental-stars hero plate (three fictional star strikers — Solano, Ferraz and Rocher — plus the trophy already arranged) plus a flag-pattern swatch, and finish it into a cinematic, high-contrast, signature-colour-accented A2 300-dpi print master plus social-media versions using only Adobe connector tools.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal 5000x7000 vertical poster hero plate, night football stadium under bright floodlights, three professional male footballers in generic unbranded national-style kits positioned dramatically around a golden world-cup-style trophy on a plinth in the centre, dynamic low-angle hero composition, deliberately FLAT UNGRADED log-style colour (low contrast, slightly milky blacks, desaturated), slightly soft focus, real skin pores and individual hair flyaways, documentary sports-photography realism, NOT glossy CGI, no text, no logos, no flags. This is a pre-grade flattened composite the colourist will finish.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like a real flattened multi-source composite handed off for grading: intentionally flat/log colour and slightly soft so the downstream auto-tone + contrast + grade steps have headroom to work. Unbranded kit and no real flags to avoid IP; faces generic (not actual celebrities) since the connector never needs true likenesses. All three players are graded directly on this plate via prompt-masking — no separate cut-out plates are supplied or needed.

defects.location: center player (Ferraz), lower body behind the plinth
defects.description: The middle footballer's legs/feet are entirely occluded and his torso appears truncated at the plinth top without any visible lower body transition; his mid-section is ambiguous, giving a slightly disembodied 'floating behind pedestal' feel.
Central player's eyes are slightly unfocused/asymmetric and the mouth area is a touch soft compared to the flanking players, but within documentary-soft tolerance.

defects.location: bottom-left crop, second pair of legs behind right player
defects.description: A partial extra pair of white shorts/legs is visible tucked behind the plinth on the left, indicating a third player's lower body positioning that reads slightly cramped/overlapping but not fused.
Golden trophy surface is somewhat smeared/low-detail with slightly soft handle geometry, consistent with intended soft focus but on the edge of mushy.

panel.summary: Solid photoreal flat-log composite matching the brief with no text or garbled anatomy, only minor softness on the trophy and the center player's occluded/ambiguous lower body to watch.

defects.location: overall image, especially black plinth, night sky, socks, and floodlight areas
defects.description: The plate reads already contrasty and finished rather than deliberately flat/log-style with milky blacks and grading headroom as specified.

panel.summary: Clean photoreal hero plate with no text or anatomy failures, but the contrast/black levels are too finished for the specified flat pre-grade composite.

defects.location: bottom-right, hand of player on the right
defects.description: The fingers on the right-hand player's right hand are unnaturally long, waxy, and posed in a slightly malformed way, a clear AI-generation artifact that compromises realism.

panel.summary: This is a strong plate but it's unusable as-is due to a malformed hand on the right-hand player, requiring an immediate fix.
No defects detected; fully complies with purpose and intentional realism constraints.

results.requirement:
TASK: Edit a Dutch real-estate interior to a bright, clean, realistic Streetline-style finish — straighten verticals, recover an HDR-look exposure, fix white balance, pull the blown-out window view back, neutralize one distracting wall outlet, and deliver a high-res JPG.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal real-estate listing photo of an empty modern Dutch living room shot on a wide-angle lens at chest height, taken slightly tilted so the vertical wall lines lean a few degrees (un-straightened, as a raw real-estate capture). Bright daylight interior but the tall garden-facing windows on the left are slightly blown out to near-white. Light oak engineered floor, white plaster walls, a grey three-seat sofa, a low wooden TV console, a green potted plant. One small white double power outlet visible low on the right-hand wall as a distracting element. Realistic mixed daylight/tungsten color cast (slightly warm), natural shadows, real-world imperfections, fine sensor noise, documentary architectural-photography feel, NOT a glossy CGI render. 3:2, high resolution.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like an unedited raw real-estate capture: intentionally tilted verticals, a real (not stylized) slight warm white-balance cast, and genuinely near-blown windows so the straighten/white-balance/window-pull steps have something real to correct. Visible small wall outlet so the fill_area clean-up has a real fixed-color target. Real floor grain and sensor noise, no CGI gloss.

defects.description: The stated task is to DELIVER an edited/corrected version (straightened verticals, HDR recovery, neutralized warm cast, pulled-back windows, outlet removed). This asset is still the RAW uncorrected input: verticals lean, strong warm/tungsten cast dominates, windows are fully blown to near-white, and both wall outlets are still present. As a raw capture it matches the PURPOSE description, but it does not reflect the requested finished edit.
Purpose mentions one distracting outlet; two double outlets are visible (one behind TV console, one lower right). Not a glitch, just a count note.
Windows are clipped to pure white with no gradient — intended near-blown look, acceptable as raw input but worth noting the window view is fully lost.

panel.summary: A clean, photoreal raw real-estate capture with no AI anatomy/text/geometry glitches, but it is still the un-edited input rather than the requested straightened/HDR/color-corrected deliverable.
Clean, realistic raw real-estate interior with no visible AI glitches, malformed objects, artifacts, or fidelity failures.
This asset is a flawless execution of the client's request for a raw, unedited source photo.
Flawless raw real-estate capture meeting all requirements with no AI defects.

defects.description: The stated task is to DELIVER an edited/corrected version (straightened verticals, HDR recovery, neutralized warm cast, pulled-back windows, outlet removed). This asset is still the RAW uncorrected input: verticals lean, strong warm/tungsten cast dominates, windows are fully blown to near-white, and both wall outlets are still present. As a raw capture it matches the PURPOSE description, but it does not reflect the requested finished edit.

results.requirement:
TASK: Take a property's three raw Nodalview-HDR exports (luxury interior, pool deck, sea/sky terrace) and finish them into a consistent, natural, premium listing set — level horizons, balance exposure/white-balance, gently enhance pool water, sea color, sky and vegetation, brighten interiors and balance the bright window view, then deliver matched 2048px web JPEGs plus a 16:9 listing hero.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal real-estate interior of a luxury Caribbean villa living room, shot on a wide lens at golden hour, HDR-bracketed look that is slightly flat and under-punchy straight from camera. Pale travertine floor, linen sofas, a large open window framing a bright over-exposed sea view so the interior reads a touch dark by comparison. Subtle warm tungsten color cast on the indoor walls, very slight green tint in the shadows. Natural documentary real-estate framing, realistic textures, real reflections on the floor, no people. Horizon through the window very slightly tilted by about 1.5 degrees. Photorealistic, not CGI-glossy.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Deliberately flat/slightly-dark interior with a blown bright window and a mixed warm/green cast so the auto-tone, exposure, white-balance, shadow-lift and indoor/outdoor-balance steps all have something real to correct. ~1.5° tilt gives auto_straighten a target. 3:2, ~4000px long edge.

panel.summary: Clean photoreal luxury villa interior matching the stated raw HDR real-estate brief with no visible AI glitches or prepress defects.

defects.description: Exposed roof beams are mostly consistent but the beam spacing and intersections near the top-center ridge read slightly irregular; not clearly a glitch, borderline acceptable for a real timber roof.

defects.location: foreground sofas and shadowed floor areas
defects.description: Intentionally flat/dark interior with mild warm-green cast in shadows — matches the stated raw-HDR brief, so this is expected input, not a defect.

panel.summary: A clean, photoreal luxury Caribbean villa interior with a blown sea view exactly matching the brief — no garbled text, anatomy, or melted geometry, just the intended flat/warm raw look awaiting correction.
This is a flawless, professional-grade raw photograph that perfectly matches the client's brief and is ready for post-production.
Flawless photoreal execution matching all intentional imperfections and zero AI defects.

results.requirement:
TASK: Edit one real-estate listing's frames into MLS-ready, consistently styled images: tone-map the wide-DR exterior (window pull), enhance the sky, pop the lawn, straighten and crop, then lock that look as a preset and push it across the interior frames for a uniform property set.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal real-estate exterior real-estate-photography frame of a two-story suburban American home shot on a wide-angle lens, single wide-dynamic-range exposure: the front facade is in open shade and slightly underexposed while the sky is bright and near-blown and the large front windows are completely blown out white, a green-but-slightly-patchy front lawn, paved driveway, leaning vertical lines and a slightly tilted horizon as if shot handheld and not leveled. Documentary HDR-source look, real brick and siding texture, real window reflections, no people, no text, no watermark, midday overcast-bright light, slight lens barrel distortion at the edges.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like an UNEDITED bracket-source/RAW-ish frame: blown windows + bright sky + shaded underexposed facade (so highlight recovery and the window pull have something to recover), visible tilt and leaning verticals (so auto-straighten/crop have work to do), and a real-but-imperfect lawn (so the masked lawn boost is visible). No HDR tone-mapping already baked in.

panel.summary: Clean, photoreal RAW-ish real-estate exterior with the intended blown windows/sky, shaded facade, tilt, and patchy lawn — no AI artifacts detected.
Clean photoreal RAW-ish real-estate exterior frame with intentional blown sky/windows, tilt, shaded facade, and imperfect lawn matching the stated purpose.
This asset is a flawless execution of the brief, perfectly representing an unedited source photo ready for post-processing with no detectable generation errors.
Flawless match to purpose with no AI artifacts or defects

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal studio headshot of a confident 45-year-old male luxury real-estate broker, charcoal tailored suit, no tie, arms loosely crossed, three-quarter turn toward camera, neutral seamless dark-gray studio backdrop, soft key light with subtle rim light, real skin pores and a few flyaway hairs, slight five-o'clock shadow, candid editorial expression, shot on 85mm f1.8, shallow depth of field, never CGI-glossy, full frame portrait orientation, sharp focus on eyes
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must look like a real photographer's studio capture: visible pores, individual hair strands, natural skin specular highlights, a clean but real seamless backdrop so the connector's subject-isolation has a believable edge to find. No retouching baked in (the connector does the retouch).

defects.description: The white shirt collar and jacket lapel meet in a slightly ambiguous fold where the collar geometry gets a bit soft, but reads as plausible natural fabric drape.

panel.summary: A clean, photoreal studio broker headshot with real skin texture, correct anatomy, believable lighting and a usable seamless backdrop edge — no garbled text or AI-glitch failures, only a trivially soft collar fold.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): An authentic, heavily-aged scanned color studio portrait of a woman from the late 1960s, photographed straight-on as a flatbed scan. Strong overall yellow-orange color cast and faded, low-contrast tones typical of decayed C-print dye; muted, washed-out skin and fabric colors. Visible real photographic grain, soft focus, slight blur. The whole frame is very slightly tilted (about 2-3 degrees) as if placed crooked on a scanner, with a thin uneven white scan border and a faint dust speckle. Period-correct hair, makeup, clothing and studio lighting. Documentary realism, real pores and individual hair strands, no CGI gloss, no modern color.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as a genuine decayed 1968 C-print scan: yellow cast + flat faded contrast are the damage the chain must FIX, so do NOT pre-correct them. Keep the slight tilt and ragged white scan border for the straighten+crop steps to act on. Native grain so the later light-grain step blends naturally.

panel.summary: Authentic-looking decayed 1968 C-print studio portrait scan with correct yellow cast, faded contrast, native grain, slight tilt and ragged white border — all intended input imperfections, no AI-generation defects detected.

TASK: From the approved folk-art 20th-Anniversary master, produce a print-ready 5-screen separation pack (white underbase + four spot-colour halftone plates with a dot-gain choke), a vectorized hard-edge lettering/line plate, a grain-textured client proof, and the registration/separation sheet rendered out of the supplied Illustrator template (PDF and SVG as two separate render passes).
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A handcrafted folk-art / festival-poster style illustration celebrating a classical Christian school's 20th anniversary, portrait orientation roughly 2:3, on a cream paper ground. A dense narrative composition weaving small vignettes: a chapel with a cross, students in uniform reading books, an oak-lined quad, a schoolhouse facade, a choir, families at a community feast, scrolls and laurels, a banner reading 'BAYOU CROSS CLASSICAL ACADEMY' across the top and '20 YEARS - 2006-2026' along the bottom in clean serif lettering. Limited screen-print palette of deep Marian blue, antique gold, brick red and ink black on cream. Soft flat tonal shading inside the figures, hard-edge solid lettering. Slight hand-printed registration imperfection, visible paper texture, individual line-work strokes — looks like a real handmade screen-print poster, never CGI-glossy. Flattened, full-bleed, high resolution.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): gemini-3-pro-image chosen because the deliverable hinges on legible, correctly-spelled commemorative TITLE and YEAR lettering plus a logo-like banner — its strength. Must look like a finalized, approved flat illustration (the client's sign-off artwork), with genuine paper tooth and limited spot-ink palette so the halftone/separation steps have real soft-tone passages AND hard-edge lettering to separate. No photographic depth, no gradients deeper than flat screen-print shading. Client and banner text are the fictional 'Bayou Cross Classical Academy' — no real school, denomination-figure, or person is depicted.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal wide horizontal photograph of a traditional South Indian service storefront / festive premises scene at golden hour: warm sunlight, marigold garlands, brass lamps, a draped maroon-and-gold cloth backdrop, a small decorated counter or seva table in the foreground. On the wall behind the counter hangs the business signboard carrying the SAME brand as brand_logo_flat.png: the circular maroon-and-gold crest (a brass oil-lamp / kuthuvilakku in the centre, the Tamil-script business name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' curved along the top arc, a small lotus underline) shown together with the Tamil business name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை'. That Tamil name is the ONLY brand name anywhere in the frame — no other business name, no English or romanised wordmark on the board. Slightly tilted handheld framing (visibly off-level horizon by ~3 degrees), mildly overexposed sky in the top-right corner, real documentary look — natural skin pores on a person partially in frame, individual marigold petals, dust motes in the light, no CGI gloss. 3:1 ultra-wide aspect, high resolution.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Deliberately tilted horizon and one blown-highlight region so straighten / highlight-recovery / auto-tone steps have real work to do. Warm festive palette gives the gold/maroon grade something genuine to push. Must look like a real phone/DSLR capture, not a render. Signboard MUST carry the ONE canonical brand — the same circular kuthuvilakku crest and the Tamil name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' as on brand_logo_flat.png — so the hero photo and the logo agree on a single brand identity (name, mark, and maroon/gold palette). No 'SRI LAKSHMI SEVA NILAYAM' or any other name.

The large lower Tamil text 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' is legible and correct, but subtle glyph inconsistency vs. the curved arc version creates two slightly different renderings of the same name.

Hands are mostly plausible but fingers holding the offering are slightly soft/merged; borderline but not clearly malformed.

results.requirement:
TASK: Take my supplied Tamil banner master files plus hero photography and brand logo, and produce the complete print-ready production package — graded hero image with print bleed, a clean vector logo, a traditional halftone texture motif, and CMYK 150-dpi PDF/JPEG exports of all six large-format banners — with editable source files alongside.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat, slightly low-resolution raster brand logo for a traditional Tamil service business: a circular emblem with a stylised oil-lamp (kuthuvilakku) motif, the Tamil-script business name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' curved along the top arc, and a small lotus underline, in solid maroon and gold on a plain white background. 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' is the one and only brand name — no English or romanised wordmark. Crisp solid color fills, no gradients, no photographic texture — the kind of logo that would vectorize cleanly. Render at modest resolution so visible pixel/edge stair-stepping is present.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Solid-fill, limited-palette emblem is the correct candidate for image_vectorize (raster->clean SVG). Mild aliasing makes the vectorize step a genuine cleanup, not a no-op. Tamil glyphs are baked into the raster (we never re-typeset). This crest — circular kuthuvilakku emblem + Tamil name 'பாரம்பரிய சேவை' + lotus underline in maroon/gold — is the CANONICAL master mark; every other brand-carrying asset (e.g. the hero signboard, the banner masters, last year's proof) must show this same name, mark and palette.

The lamp outline has irregular, slightly wavering maroon strokes with inconsistent thickness and a few pixel-stepped edges that read as loose vectorization candidates rather than clean solid fills.

Solid #046CB8 strokes, uniform 6px stroke weight, generous padding, no text labels, no anti-alias fringing, crisp vector-style line art, 2048x1365 px.

It is stitched in exactly four thread colors: forest green, cream, slate grey, and a black outline, on a heathered grey-green fabric backing, with a slightly raised satin-stitch merrowed border. The photo is slightly tilted about 3 degrees clockwise, dull and mildly underexposed with soft indoor lighting, a faint cool green color cast, and the woven twill thread texture is clearly visible across every color so the edges look soft and fuzzy rather than crisp. TASK: Clean and vectorize LUMIÈRE MÉNAGE's supplied flat monochrome logo concept into an editable SVG master, then assemble the full reversible variant system — black-on-white master, white-on-dark knockout, avatar/PFP crop, stacked lockup, one-color black print PNG, a mono-tint alt, a monochrome palette recipe, and a font recommendation — all scalable from avatar to signage.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat, high-contrast monochrome logo concept export for a modern clean-beauty skincare brand. A bold, minimal, geometric monogram mark resolving the letters 'L' and 'M' into a single symmetric abstract shape built from crisp straight lines and negative space (no illustration, no ornament, no flourishes) sits centered above a clean modern condensed sans-serif wordmark reading 'LUMIÈRE MÉNAGE' in all caps, with a thin small tagline 'CLEAN BEAUTY' beneath. Everything is pure black (#111111) on a near-white #F5F5F3 background — strictly one color, no gradients, no shading, no drop shadow, no color. The whole lockup is very slightly rotated about 2 degrees clockwise as if exported at a tilt, with faint compression softness at the edges. Crisp legible type, hard geometric edges, high resolution 2400x2000px.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as a real client-supplied 'approved concept, only have it as a flat PNG' hand-off: a genuine ~2 degree skew so auto_straighten has real work, an off-white (#F5F5F3) rather than pure-white background so remove_background + auto_tone are warranted, mild compression softness, and hard high-contrast geometric edges + legible type so image_vectorize yields clean monochrome paths and select_by_prompt / crop_to_bounds can target the monogram vs the wordmark. Strictly monochrome per the brief (no gradients/multicolor) so the vectorize and the reversed knockout stay clean. gemini-3-pro-image is chosen for faithful, correctly-spelled logo text over a photoreal model.

defects.description: The monogram reads clearly as 'M' with interlocking chevron/negative-space strokes but the 'L' is only weakly implied; brief asked for a symmetric abstract shape resolving both L and M — the mark is slightly asymmetric and L-legibility is marginal, but acceptable as a concept.
Spelling and accents (grave on È, acute on É) are correct and legible; only faint compression softness on edges, which is on-purpose per brief. No garbling.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A 1400x1400 flat PNG of an AI-generated ornamental brand crest: a symmetrical scrollwork badge / laurel-wreath shape enclosing a small centered tea-leaf-and-steam motif, rendered in a single deep amber (#B4741F) line-art style with fine filigree detail. Sits centered on a faint off-white (#F5F2EC) softly textured card filling the frame. AI-export tells: slightly soft edges, faint noise, mild uneven lighting, and the badge rotated about 2 degrees off-level. High-contrast flat line art, crisp filigree, no gradients, no watermark, no 3D.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): The 'one ornamental style logo' from the brief. Single-color high-contrast filigree is ideal for a clean vectorize AND for deriving a solid-fill one-color knockout + a halftone variant. The fine detail tests 'improving line sharpness' after the trace. 8-bit sRGB PNG.

panel.summary: Clean single-color ornamental tea crest matches the stated purpose with no actionable defects.

defects.location: center motif — steam curl above tea leaves
defects.description: The steam swirl is slightly asymmetric and reads a touch loosely resolved, but not broken; consistent with intended AI-export softness.
Faint noise/grain and mild uneven lighting/gradient toward center, as expected from the stated AI-export tells; edges slightly soft.

panel.summary: Clean single-color amber filigree crest with a centered tea-leaf-and-steam motif on faint off-white card — no text, no anatomy, no garbling; only the intended soft edges and faint noise present, making it a solid vectorize candidate.
This is an exceptionally clean AI-generated asset that's a perfect source for the vector tracing job.
Flawless ornamental crest matching all specifications with only intended imperfections.

results.requirement:
TASK: Clean and de-skew the client's three AI-generated tea-brand raster logos, trace them into crisp scalable SVG masters, derive one-color and halftone print variants of the crest, and produce a matching front-facing stand-up-pouch label base panel from the supplied pouch mockup.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A 1600x1200 flat PNG of an AI-generated tea-brand wordmark logo as it would look straight out of an image generator: the words 'Golden Chai Co.' set in a warm, slightly ornate serif with a subtle gold-to-amber vertical gradient on the letterforms and a thin cream keyline, above a small tagline 'MASALA CHAI - EST. BLEND'. The whole lockup sits centered on a faint off-white (#F4F1EA) softly textured paper card that fills the frame. Give it the tell-tale AI-export traits: very slightly soft anti-aliased edges, faint luminance noise across the card, mildly uneven lighting, and the whole logo rotated about 2.5 degrees clockwise so the baseline is not level. Crisp readable type, accurate kerning, no watermark, no 3D gloss, flat art.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as a believable AI export, not a pre-cleaned vector: keep the textured off-white card (no transparency), soft edges, faint noise and ~2.5deg tilt — the exact defects the chain must fix (auto_straighten, tonal cleanup, crop, background knock) before vectorizing. The gold gradient tests the 'preserve every colour and gradient exactly' clause. Text must stay legible so the trace is meaningful. 8-bit sRGB PNG.

defects.description: Spelling correct and legible; slight softness on the cream keyline edges is intentional AI-export softness, not a garble defect.
Mild uneven luminance across the off-white card — intended imperfection, noted only for completeness.

panel.summary: Clean, legible 'Golden Chai Co.' wordmark with correct tagline, gold gradient, cream keyline and the specified tilt/softness/noise — a believable AI export matching purpose with no genuine defects.
Clean, readable, on-brief AI-export style logo with no visible broken text, artifacts, or fidelity failures.
This asset is a flawless execution of the brief, perfectly simulating a clean AI-generated logo ready for vectorization.

defects.description: background lacks required soft texture and faint luminance noise; should be textured paper card
logo has no clockwise rotation (missing required 2.5-degree tilt as per purpose)
background lighting is perfectly even; should exhibit mild unevenness as specified

panel.summary: Critical fidelity failures: missing texture/noise, absent tilt, and uniform background lighting violate core purpose requirements.

defects.description: background lacks required soft texture and faint luminance noise; should be textured paper card

results.requirement:
TASK: Audit the supplied Maison Valcere luxury wordmark pack (master SVG + raster export) against the brand guideline and the press/foil spec, and return a marked-up, region-referenced vector & print-readiness findings report listing every hairline-stroke, line-weight, palette, kerning and non-print-ready-path defect and the exact rule it breaks.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A 2400x900 flat PNG raster export of the same 'VALCERE' luxury jewelry wordmark as the studio delivered it for web: high-contrast white didone-style serif letters on a transparent background, with the small letter-spaced 'MAISON VALCERE - HAUTE JOAILLERIE' tagline beneath. Render it with subtly WIDER letter-spacing / kerning than a tight master would have (a believable raster-vs-vector drift), crisp anti-aliased edges, no watermark, flat art, no 3D. Purely typographic, no icons.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): The flat raster the house has been using online. Its deliberately looser kerning vs. the vector master is a real defect the audit catches by trace-comparing the two (image_vectorize the PNG, compare against the master). gemini-3-pro-image for clean legible type. 8-bit sRGB PNG on transparent.

defects.description: Letter-spacing across 'VALCERE' is visibly wider than a tight master would be — an intentional raster-vs-vector drift per spec, but the audit should log it as the kerning deviation to catch.
Slight soft/blurred anti-aliasing halo along the serif edges in the zoomed crops; edges are marginally less crisp than an ideal vector export but within acceptable raster tolerance.

panel.summary: Clean high-contrast white Didone 'VALCERE' wordmark with correctly spelled tagline on true transparency — only the intended looser kerning and mild edge softness to log, no genuine AI defects.
Clean, legible transparent luxury wordmark export with correct VALCERE and tagline text and no visible AI or prepress-breaking defects.

defects.description: The entire tagline 'MAISON VALCERE - HAUTE JOAILLERIE' is duplicated and slightly offset, rendering the text as a blurry, ghosted, and completely unreadable garble.

A severe doubling/ghosting artifact is present across the entire tagline, likely caused by a duplicated and misaligned layer during export. This is not a stylistic choice; it is a fundamental rendering failure.

panel.summary: This asset is an immediate rejection; the entire tagline is a duplicated, ghosted, unreadable mess due to a critical rendering error.

defects.location: bottom-right quadrant, in the word 'JOAILLERIE' (8th character position)
defects.description: The letter 'R' is severely malformed: the leg is truncated and fused with the adjacent 'I', creating an illegible shape that resembles a distorted 'E' rather than a didone-serif 'R', breaking the French spelling of 'joaillerie'.

panel.summary: Malformed 'R' in 'JOAILLERIE' destroys brand fidelity and typographic integrity.

defects.description: The entire tagline 'MAISON VALCERE - HAUTE JOAILLERIE' is duplicated and slightly offset, rendering the text as a blurry, ghosted, and completely unreadable garble.

results.requirement:
TASK: Audit the outsourced editor's Voltcast episode deliverables -- the 16:9 YouTube master and the 9:16 vertical cut -- against the channel's written delivery-spec sheet, and return a timestamp-referenced QC findings report (as a report PDF plus structured JSON) listing every spec drift: duration, resolution/fps, missing intro/outro, unsafe-margin overlays and off-brand text.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A clean flat brand reference sheet on a neutral background showing three labelled panels of the APPROVED Voltcast on-screen elements: (1) the correct branded intro end-card (channel wordmark + episode strap), (2) the approved lower-third name/title style in the channel's specified font and colour, (3) the approved price/spec callout chip with its correct safe-margin placement guide drawn as a thin inset rectangle. Crisp flat labels, no photography, high legibility, 2400x1350px PNG.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): The reference the audit compares the episode's on-screen text against -- to catch the wrong lower-third font and the near/over-edge callouts. Flat labelled panels so preview reads the approved look unambiguously; a supplied brand reference, not connector-generated.

panel.summary: Clean three-panel Voltcast brand reference sheet with crisp legible labels, correct wordmark, lower-third and price/spec callout with safe-margin guide — no text, anatomy, geometry, or artifact defects.

results.requirement:
TASK: Turn one batch of raw vertical clips plus a hero still, brand logo, and a caption script into a post-ready 9:16 phonk-energy short: an AI sizzle cut reframed to 1080x1920, an on-screen caption sheet, and a fully color-graded exported thumbnail with a vector logo lockup.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Flat minimalist wordmark logo on transparent background, the single word 'NOCTURNE' in a tight geometric sans-serif, solid white glyphs, crisp clean edges, high contrast, centered, 2000x600 PNG with alpha, no photographic texture, no gradient
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Flat high-contrast solid-color art so image_vectorize produces a clean SVG; transparent alpha so it composites as a corner lockup on the thumbnail. Text-bearing → gemini-3-pro-image.

defects.description: Slight edge softness/anti-aliasing halo on glyphs rather than perfectly razor-crisp vector edges; acceptable but could vectorize slightly imperfectly. Spelling 'NOCTURNE' is correct and letterforms are all well-formed.

panel.summary: Clean correctly-spelled 'NOCTURNE' white wordmark on proper transparent alpha with only very slight edge softness.
Clean, correctly spelled NOCTURNE wordmark with solid white glyphs on proper transparent background.

defects.description: Letterforms are malformed, wobbly, and not geometrically precise. Strokes are inconsistent, curves are not smooth, and straight lines are not straight, especially visible on the 'R', 'N', and 'E'.
Edges of all glyphs are soft, blurry, and poorly anti-aliased instead of being crisp and sharp. This creates a halo effect that will prevent clean vectorization.
Asset fails to meet the core brief requirements of 'crisp clean edges' and 'tight geometric sans-serif', making it completely unusable for its intended purpose as a vector-ready logo.
The entire image has an unwanted softness and lack of sharpness, which is a fundamental technical failure for a high-contrast graphic asset.

panel.summary: This is garbage; the letterforms are wobbly and malformed, and the blurry edges make it completely unusable as a professional logo.
Flawless vector-style wordmark with perfect typography and clean edges on transparent background.

A clear human subject so image_select_subject / Subject-Pop preset are meaningful.

results.requirement:
TASK: Pre-flight four supplied traveller-themed t-shirt vector graphics for screen-print separation readiness -- verify transparent backgrounds, count distinct spot colors per design, check for registration marks and thin-line survivability, vectorize/inspect to flag raster contamination -- and emit a marked-up per-design seps audit report with a go/no-go recommendation for the exposure room.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat screen-print-style t-shirt graphic of a generic minimalist city skyline silhouette at dusk, but rendered with a smooth multi-stop gradient sky (orange to purple) behind the black skyline and a soft drop shadow -- clearly NOT separation-ready spot art, more like a photo-style poster. On a transparent background. Photoreal-ish blended tones, no hard flat color breaks.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): The 'trap' design: gradients + soft shadow = effectively unlimited tones, impossible on a 4-color manual press without halftone work; should draw a NO-GO / needs-reseparation verdict. gpt-image-2 for the blended gradient/shadow look.

results.requirement:
TASK: Clean and de-skew Apexguard's three AI-drafted PPF/tint logo rasters, trace them into crisp production SVG masters, derive one-color knockouts for vinyl weeding, then assemble a multi-size die-cut vinyl decal/sticker sheet by binding the vector marks and the approved-sizes CSV into the client's authored cut-line template and exporting a press-ready PDF + SVG.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A 1600x1000 flat PNG of an AI-generated automotive-brand master wordmark logo as it would look straight out of an image generator: the word 'APEXGUARD' set in a clean modern condensed sans-serif in matte near-black (#161719), with a single small deep-blue (#123A6B) accent chevron sitting just left of the 'A', and a thin all-caps tagline 'AUTO FILM - PPF & TINT' beneath. Premium, minimalist, performance-automotive feel, no gradients, no mascot, no badge. The whole lockup sits centered on a faint off-white (#F3F1EC) softly textured paper card that fills the frame. Give it the tell-tale AI-export traits: very slightly soft anti-aliased edges, faint luminance noise across the card, mildly uneven lighting, and the whole logo rotated about 2.5 degrees clockwise so the baseline is not level. Crisp readable type, accurate kerning, no watermark, no 3D gloss, flat art.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as a believable AI export, not a pre-cleaned vector: keep the textured off-white card (no transparency), soft edges, faint noise and ~2.5deg tilt — the exact defects the chain must fix (auto_straighten, tonal cleanup, crop, background knock) before vectorizing. The single flat blue accent + true black test the 'preserve the exact palette' clause while keeping the trace clean. Flat, gradient-free art matches the brief's 'no heavy gradients' rule. Text must stay legible so the trace and font_recommend are meaningful. 8-bit sRGB PNG.

panel.summary: Clean, legible, on-brief AI-export logo raster with no actionable glitches.

Clean AI export exactly as briefed: crisp legible 'APEXGUARD' wordmark with 'AUTO FILM – PPF & TINT' tagline, single deep-blue chevron, matte near-black type on faintly textured off-white card with intentional ~2.5° tilt and soft edges — no genuine AI defects.
This is a perfect AI-drafted source asset, exactly as briefed and ready for vectorization.
Flawless AI-generated logo export matching all specifications with intentional imperfections correctly applied.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A 1500x1100 flat PNG of an AI-generated sub-brand mark: the wordmark 'APEXGUARD' with 'SHIELD' set smaller beneath it, next to a simple flat hexagonal shield glyph outline in deep blue (#123A6B) with a matte-black core, representing a paint-protection-film product line. results.requirement:
TASK: Restore one treasured, faded and scratched 1970s family keepsake scan -- correct the color cast and faded contrast, recover clarity/detail, conceal scratches over the plain backdrop -- and deliver a framed-A4 print-ready file (2480x3508 px, 300 DPI).
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): An authentic, heavily-aged HIGH-RESOLUTION flatbed scan of a mid-1970s color studio family snapshot: grandparents and a young girl (about six) posed together against a smooth, plain seamless CREAM/off-white studio backdrop. Strong overall warm yellow-orange color cast and faded, low-contrast tones typical of a decayed 1970s C-print dye; muted, washed-out skin tones and clothing colors. Period-correct 1970s hair, clothing and studio lighting. Several fine, bright white hairline SCRATCH lines of varying length and one short vertical crease run across the PLAIN cream backdrop area behind and beside the family (NOT across any face or figure). The whole frame is very slightly tilted (about 2-3 degrees) as if placed crooked on a scanner, with a thin ragged uneven white scan border down the left side and a faint dust speckle. Genuinely soft focus, low micro-contrast, real photographic film grain. Documentary realism, real pores and individual hair strands, no CGI gloss, no modern saturated color.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Must read as a genuine decayed 1975 C-print scan: the warm/orange cast + flat faded contrast are the damage the chain must FIX, so do NOT pre-correct them. Render it at high pixel dimensions (a real flatbed print scan is large, e.g. >=2500x3600 px) so the final A4 crop_and_resize to 2480x3508 is a genuine downscale/re-frame, NEVER an upscale. The scratches and crease MUST sit over the PLAIN cream backdrop (a single near-uniform tone) and stay OFF the faces/figures, so select-by-prompt + a matched solid fill can honestly conceal them without any generative heal. Keep the slight tilt and ragged white scan border for the straighten+crop steps to act on. Keep it genuinely soft with native grain so the clarity steps have work to do and the later light-grain step blends the fill patch naturally. gpt-image-2 for photoreal aged-print realism.

defects.description: The girl's interlaced fingers are slightly soft and ambiguous in count, but plausibly within the intended soft-focus decayed-print realism; no clearly extra/missing digits.

TASK: Clean up and cut out one raw phone shot of the Dewdrop lip-oil bottle onto a white e-commerce background, then recolor the translucent oil into 8 on-brand shade variants while keeping the metallic collar, cap, and lighting/shadow identical across all of them, and emit a variant spec sheet.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal iPhone snapshot of a single frosted-glass dropper bottle of lip oil standing upright on a cluttered studio bench. The bottle has a brushed-gold metal collar and a gold dropper cap; inside is a clear/pale translucent oil with visible internal highlights and light passing through the frosted glass. Background is a messy makeup bench with brushes, a palette and a cloth, slightly out of focus but distracting. Slightly tilted horizon (about 3 degrees), flat dull lighting, slightly cool/blue white balance, real glass reflections and condensation, candid documentary look, no studio gloss, no CGI.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): One physical sample shot on a phone, deliberately imperfect (tilt, cool/dull WB, cluttered background) so the cleanup + cutout + recolor chain has genuine work to do. The translucent oil + gold collar are the two regions the recolor must treat differently. gpt-image-2 for photoreal product.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A warm, clean, trustworthy brand look-reference photograph representing the 'cozy study desk' grade target for an online finance course: a bright wooden desk near a window with a notebook, a cup of coffee, a small plant, and soft warm morning light, cream and warm-neutral tones with a gentle indigo accent object, soft natural contrast, subtle film-like warmth. Photoreal, no text, no logo, no people.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): A believable warm/academic match target for the color-temperature and vibrance grade on the frame grabbed from the master; photoreal => gpt-image-2. Used as a grade reference only, not a deliverable — it defines the direction the flat lecture frame is warmed toward.

defects.location: center — open spiral notebook and navy hardcover beneath
defects.description: The open spiral-bound notebook has an ambiguous binding relationship with the navy hardcover beneath it; the spiral binding sits awkwardly and the two books' spines/covers merge somewhat where they overlap, slightly impossible layering.
The topmost item on the book stack reads as a partly-merged tablet/laptop hybrid with a vague keyboard-like edge; geometry is soft and undefined but not glaringly broken.

panel.summary: A clean, warm, photoreal cozy-desk brand reference that nails the grade target with no text or people and only trivial object-layering softness in the notebook stack.
Clean photoreal cozy study-desk reference with no visible text, anatomy, object, lighting, artifact, technical, or fidelity failures.
Flawless photoreal execution matching all brand requirements with no AI-generated defects.
This asset is a flawless execution of the brief and is perfectly suitable as a high-quality grade reference.

results.requirement:
TASK: Turn Meridian Academy's raw Lesson 4 material — a talking-head lecture clip plus slide-deck and spreadsheet screencasts, a logo, a brand look-reference, a cut-list brief, and a captions sheet — into a clean 16:9 lesson master (filler trimmed, cut between presenter and slides via a real video_render timeline), a 9:16 promo highlight, a graded 1280x720 course thumbnail (grabbed from the master), and on-brand intro title-card / lower-third / key-point-caption graphic plates plus a vector logo, all packaged into a dated CC handoff folder for the final NLE polish.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A flat, clean vector-style education brand logo on a transparent background: a simple rising-line-inside-a-compass mark beside the wordmark 'Meridian Academy' set in a modern geometric sans-serif. Two solid brand colors only — deep indigo (#23255A) glyphs with a single warm-gold (#F2B441) accent on the mark. Crisp edges, no gradients, no photographic texture, no drop shadow, roughly 2400x700 PNG with alpha.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Flat, high-contrast, two-color art with crisp edges so image_vectorize traces a clean SVG; transparent alpha so it reads as a real logo asset for the title cards and corner bug. Text-bearing brand mark => gemini-3-pro-image.

defects.description: The mark reads as a clock with tick marks and a rising arrow, not the specified 'rising-line-inside-a-compass' — no compass cardinal points; conceptually off-brief though visually clean.
Warm-gold arrow appears slightly muted/darker than spec #F2B441 and has subtle tonal variation at the arrowhead, but no true gradient; within acceptable flat range.

panel.summary: Clean, crisp two-color transparent logo with correctly spelled 'Meridian Academy' wordmark, but the mark reads as a clock-with-arrow rather than the briefed compass motif.

defects.location: entire logo, especially the indigo wordmark and compass ring
defects.description: Logo is not flat two-color vector art; the indigo elements have bevel-like shading, highlights, and tonal variation instead of a single solid #23255A.
Gold accent is rendered with gradient/texture and shadowing rather than one solid #F2B441 brand color.

defects.location: edges of letters, compass circle, and arrow
defects.description: Visible 3D-style lighting and dark edge shadows/drop-shadow effects conflict with the required clean, flat logo plate.

defects.location: across indigo lettering and gold arrow fills
defects.description: Subtle mottled texture/noise and uneven fills make the asset look raster-rendered rather than crisp vector-ready solid shapes.

panel.summary: The text is readable and the concept matches, but the asset fails the flat two-color vector-logo requirement due to gradients, bevel shading, shadows, and textured fills.

defects.description: The main circular element of the logo mark is not a perfect circle; its line is wobbly and has inconsistent thickness, appearing hand-drawn or poorly rendered.

All edges of the logo elements are soft, blurry, and heavily anti-aliased, which directly contradicts the brief's requirement for 'crisp edges' and will prevent a clean vector trace.
The straight lines of the internal gold arrow are not straight, and the tick marks on the circle are misshapen and poorly defined.
The asset fails to meet the core 'flat, clean vector-style' requirement of the brief due to its universally soft edges and malformed geometry.

panel.summary: This asset is a complete failure, with wobbly, non-geometric shapes and soft, blurry letterforms that make it unusable as a professional logo.

PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Flat minimalist restaurant logo on a fully transparent background: the wordmark 'EMBER & OAK' in a warm high-contrast geometric serif above a small emblem of a single flame rising from an oak leaf, one solid warm ember-orange color (#C8531B), crisp clean edges, perfectly flat with no gradients and no photographic texture, centered, 2400x1400 PNG with alpha

defects.description: The oak leaf emblem is drawn as thin outlined strokes rather than the fully solid single-color form implied; the flame is solid fill while the leaf is line art, creating slight style inconsistency, but not broken.

results.requirement:
TASK: Take six already-shot raw overhead flat-lay apparel photos, straighten and color-true each, cut every garment cleanly off its cluttered surface, place them all onto one consistent flat mid-gray backdrop, and export a high-res + web-ready square marketplace pack.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): Photoreal overhead flat-lay studio snapshot of a heather-gray men's crewneck t-shirt laid flat and neatly folded-open on a light wooden bench, shot from directly above. Slightly tilted (about 3 degrees off square), flat dull even lighting, slightly cool/blue white balance, a stray wooden clothespin and a tape measure at the edge of frame, soft shadow along one side. Real cotton knit texture, tiny lint, true documentary product-shot feel, no studio gloss. High resolution.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Deliberately imperfect (tilt, cool flat WB, cluttered wooden surface with props) so straighten + color-true + subject-select + bg-removal all have real work; gpt-image-2 for photoreal apparel. Shot at high resolution so the 3000 px marketplace crop is a downscale, never an upscale.

defects.description: The knit texture reads as a repeating, embossed/scribble-like pattern rather than natural heather cotton — an AI micro-texture artifact that looks slightly synthetic and uniform, not documentary lint/knit.
Tape measure numbering/tick marks are irregular and partly illegible where visible; not clearly garbled but not a coherent ruler scale either.
Wood grain shows faint smeared/repetitive brush-like texture in places, mild AI surface artifacting.

panel.summary: Convincing photoreal gray crewneck flat-lay that matches the brief, marred only by a slightly synthetic repeating knit-texture pattern and vague tape-measure markings — usable with minor scrutiny.

defects.location: across the gray t-shirt fabric, most visible in all zoomed quadrants
defects.description: The knit texture has a slightly overprocessed, worm-like sharpening/noise pattern that reads less like natural cotton in close inspection.

panel.summary: Solid photoreal flat-lay asset with only minor overprocessed fabric texture visible on close inspection.

defects.description: The markings on the yellow tape measure are nonsensical gibberish, not legible numbers or measurement lines. They appear as a repeating, garbled pattern instead of coherent units.
The end of the tape measure is an indistinct, soft yellow blob, lacking the defined metallic structure of a real tape measure's end cap.
The metal spring mechanism of the wooden clothespin is poorly defined, appearing as a simple dark smudge rather than a distinct, coiled metal object.

panel.summary: The t-shirt itself is photorealistic and excellent, but the props contain obvious AI flaws, including garbled text on the tape measure, making the image unusable without edits.

results.requirement:
TASK: Cut six iPhone-shot graded trading-card / hobby-box photos out of their cluttered backgrounds, straighten and tone them, place each on a clean pure-white background, and export a consistent 2048x2048 square set (plus transparent PNG cutouts) named to match the store's Shopify product handles.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A shiny chrome-refractor basketball trading card sealed in a grading slab with a black label reading 'APEX  9.5' and four small subgrade numbers; the colourful refractor card is clearly visible and sharp, centered on a plain neutral surface. Shot like a real trading-card seller's clean phone photo for an online listing: the item is CENTERED, SHARP, well-lit under soft even daylight and fills most of the frame — clearly the subject. A plain, simple surface with only a hint of casual context (to be cut out later). Realistic and neat — NOT messy, NOT cluttered, NO random junk. Any grading label shows a FICTIONAL grading company, NEVER a real brand (no PSA, BGS, SGC, CGC). It is a REAL PHOTOGRAPH — not an illustration or 3D render.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Reflective refractor + busy background stress the subject-select and background-removal steps; consistent look target across the set.

panel.summary: Clean, sharp graded-slab photo with correct fictional 'APEX 9.5' label and legible text; only a slight hand-grip softness prevents a perfect score.
This asset is a flawless, high-quality photograph that perfectly meets all specifications with no detectable defects.
Clean, centered, sharp, and free of visible AI glitches or production defects.

results.requirement:
TASK: Cut six iPhone-shot graded trading-card / hobby-box photos out of their cluttered backgrounds, straighten and tone them, place each on a clean pure-white background, and export a consistent 2048x2048 square set (plus transparent PNG cutouts) named to match the store's Shopify product handles.
PURPOSE (what this asset should depict): A modern baseball rookie trading card sealed in a clear hard-plastic grading slab; the slab's top label reads 'GRADEX  GEM-MT 10' in red on white; the rookie card and its photo are clearly visible and readable, no glare hiding it, resting slightly tilted on a plain light-wood desk. Shot like a real trading-card seller's clean phone photo for an online listing: the item is CENTERED, SHARP, well-lit under soft even daylight and fills most of the frame — clearly the subject. A plain, simple surface with only a hint of casual context (to be cut out later). Realistic and neat — NOT messy, NOT cluttered, NO random junk. Any grading label shows a FICTIONAL grading company, NEVER a real brand (no PSA, BGS, SGC, CGC). It is a REAL PHOTOGRAPH — not an illustration or 3D render.
INTENDED REALISM (imperfections that are ON PURPOSE — do NOT flag these): Deliberately imperfect (tilt, cool cast, busy table, plastic glare) so the cutout + straighten + tone + center-on-white pipeline has genuine work to do; gpt-image-2 for photoreal reflective plastic.

panel.summary: Clean, photoreal graded-slab shot with sharp readable fictional GRADEX GEM-MT 10 label, correct anatomy, and intended casual tilt/context — no AI defects.

defects.description: The stated label text should read 'GRADEX  GEM-MT 10' in red on white; 'GRADEX' is rendered in black while only 'GEM-MT 10' is red.

panel.summary: Clean, believable trading-card slab photo with readable fictional branding; only minor color mismatch on the grading label text.
This asset is flawless and perfectly matches the brief with no detectable AI artifacts.
Flawless original shot matching purpose with no AI defects; all text, anatomy, and object integrity correct despite intended casual imperfections.
